title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies:
Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies!
